languages.text: "Нельзя ли поживее? У меня есть и другие дела".

traits.locale_text: "Нельзя ли поживее? У меня есть и другие дела".

languages.text: "Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."
languages.original_text: "Нельзя ли поживее? У меня есть и другие дела".

traits.locale_text: "Can you not be swifter about it? I have other matters to attend to."
"Can you not be swifter about it? I have other matters to attend to."
"Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."
"Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."
"Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."

languages.text: "Würdet Ihr Euch bitte beeilen? Ich muss mich um andere Dinge kümmern."
languages.original_text: "Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: "Würdet Ihr Euch bitte beeilen? Ich muss mich um andere Dinge kümmern."

languages.text: “你能快点吗？我还有别的事要处理。”
languages.original_text: "Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: “你能快点吗？我还有别的事要处理。”

languages.text: « Est-ce que vous pourriez vous dépêcher un peu ? J'ai d'autres affaires à régler. »
languages.original_text: "Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: « Est-ce que vous pourriez vous dépêcher un peu ? J'ai d'autres affaires à régler. »

languages.text: «¿Puedes darte prisa? Tengo otros asuntos que atender».
languages.original_text: "Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: «¿Puedes darte prisa? Tengo otros asuntos que atender».

languages.text: "Acele eder misin? İlgilenmem gereken başka meseleler var."
languages.original_text: "Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: "Acele eder misin? İlgilenmem gereken başka meseleler var."

languages.text: 「この件を早く進めていただけますか。他に用事があります。」
languages.original_text: "Can you please hurry this along? I have other matters to attend to."

traits.locale_text: 「この件を早く進めていただけますか。他に用事があります。」
